proposed_outputs.title: Prepare the volunteer-day kit
basis: The request describes a concrete upcoming event package.
The work needs a volunteer brief and support materials.

proposed_outputs.title: Draft spring signage
basis: The request explicitly calls for signage.
The signage belongs to Harbor Garden rather than the system-governance domain.

proposed_outputs.title: Review the volunteer brief and signage as one event package
basis: The package should be judged together before printing or posting.
